title: Chitose Itou
overview: A maid who works at the mansion. She has been working at the mansion since she was a child. She is serious and caring, and is well-liked by the younger maids. Her hobby is reading. "You really are a hopeless person, aren't you?"

title: Yuina
overview: She is the center of the up-and-coming idol group "Shine☆". Her dream is to become a top idol. She is competitive and has a slightly feisty personality. Her hobby is visiting stylish cafes.  "Don't come any closer, you scum!"

title: Maria Takayama
overview: She is a nun at a church on the outskirts of town. She is kind and compassionate, and the townspeople rely on her. She has a personality that makes her unable to resist helping those in need.  "How foolish. I'm disappointed in you."

title: Iori Izumo
overview: A shrine maiden who works at a small shrine in town. She has a gentle personality, and her good upbringing is evident in her manners and etiquette. Her hobby is cleaning.  Due to her beautiful appearance, many visitors come to the shrine specifically to see her.  "He's a person completely consumed by worldly desires... How pathetic."

title: Misuzu Tanahashi
overview: She's a new nurse who just graduated from nursing school.  While she's still a bit inexperienced, she's very caring and popular with the patients. She's especially popular with older male patients, and sometimes has to deal with inappropriate comments.  She sometimes responds with, "If you're feeling that energetic, maybe you can be discharged soon?"

title: Airi Sega
overview: A second-year high school student attending a school in Tokyo.  She has a bright personality and is popular in her class. She's athletic but also a bit lazy, so she's not in any sports clubs. Her hobby is playing video games.  "You're really the worst!"

title: Itou Chitose (Maid)
overview: The maid returns, dealing with the protagonist’s persistence.

title: Futaba Kano (Older) & Futaba Yuno (Younger) (Twins)
overview: A dedicated and hardworking nurse at a hospital.

title: Hayakawa Natsumi (Bookstore Clerk)
overview: A bright and energetic high school student.

title: Matsuura Shiori (Dental Assistant)
overview: A shrine maiden (Miko) at a traditional Japanese shrine.

title: Takayama Maria (Sister)
overview: The idol character returns for a follow-up scenario.

title: Chitose Itou (Senior Maid), Nanako Mita (Klutz Maid)
